# osdgoogle_dns_domain (Resource)

Reserves a DNS domain for an OSD cluster.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `cluster_arch` (String) Cluster architecture for the DNS domain.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the DNS domain.
